entries.applies_to: Governments and public-health authorities setting or reviewing ambient air-quality standards

entries.document: Convention on Long-range Transboundary Air Pollution (CLRTAP)
entries.applies_to: UNECE parties in Europe, North America and Central Asia reducing transboundary air pollution

entries.document: Gothenburg Protocol (to Abate Acidification, Eutrophication and Ground-level Ozone)
entries.applies_to: CLRTAP parties committing to national emission ceilings for SO2, NOx, VOCs, NH3 and PM2.5

entries.document: Directive (EU) 2024/2881 — Ambient Air Quality and Cleaner Air for Europe
entries.applies_to: EU Member States managing ambient air-quality zones, monitoring, limit values and plans
supersedes: Directive 2008/50/EC — Ambient Air Quality and Cleaner Air for Europe
Directive 2004/107/EC — Arsenic, cadmium, mercury, nickel and PAHs in ambient air

entries.document: Directive 2008/50/EC — Ambient Air Quality and Cleaner Air for Europe
entries.applies_to: EU Member States assessing and managing ambient air quality (superseded regime)
entries.superseded_by: Directive (EU) 2024/2881 — Ambient Air Quality and Cleaner Air for Europe

entries.document: Directive 2004/107/EC — Arsenic, cadmium, mercury, nickel and PAHs in ambient air
entries.applies_to: EU Member States setting target values for heavy metals and PAHs in ambient air (superseded regime)
entries.superseded_by: Directive (EU) 2024/2881 — Ambient Air Quality and Cleaner Air for Europe

entries.document: Clean Air Act (42 U.S.C. 7401 et seq.)
entries.applies_to: Stationary and mobile air-emission sources in the United States; EPA and state agencies

entries.document: National Ambient Air Quality Standards (NAAQS, 40 CFR part 50)
entries.applies_to: US states meeting health- and welfare-based standards for the six criteria pollutants
UK competent authorities assessing and managing ambient air quality against limit values
equivalents: Directive 2008/50/EC — Ambient Air Quality and Cleaner Air for Europe

entries.document: Environment Act 2021, section 2 — PM2.5 air quality target
entries.applies_to: UK Secretary of State duty to set a legally binding PM2.5 ambient air-quality target

entries.document: The Environmental Targets (Fine Particulate Matter) (England) Regulations 2023 (SI 2023/96)
entries.applies_to: England: statutory PM2.5 annual-mean concentration and population-exposure reduction targets
Organisations measuring and managing indoor air quality across buildings and vehicles

entries.document: ISO 16000-40:2019 — Indoor air: Part 40, Indoor air quality management system
entries.applies_to: Organisations establishing an indoor air quality management system for buildings and facilities
